name: Broken Access Control
description: Restrictions on authenticated users not properly enforced.
remediation: Implement proper access control checks on every request. Deny by default.

name: Cryptographic Failures
description: Failures related to cryptography leading to sensitive data exposure.
remediation: Encrypt sensitive data at rest and in transit. Use strong algorithms.

name: Injection
description: SQL, NoSQL, OS, and LDAP injection attacks.
remediation: Use parameterized queries, input validation, and escape special characters.

name: Security Misconfiguration
description: Missing security hardening, improper permissions, unnecessary features enabled.
remediation: Follow security hardening guides. Disable debug mode in production.

name: Vulnerable Components
remediation: Keep dependencies updated. Use tools like safety or snyk.

name: Authentication Failures
description: Weak authentication mechanisms, credential stuffing vulnerabilities.
remediation: Implement MFA, rate limiting, and secure session management.
